sections.paragraph:
Original: נקּין נקּיון

Transliteration: niqqâyôn niqqâyôn

Phonetic: nik-kaw-yone'

BDB Definition:

  1. innocency
    1. freedom from guilt, innocency
    2. freedom from punishment
    3. cleanness of teeth (physical sense)

Origin: from H5352

TWOT entry: 1412c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
